title: Tony Clubb
extract:
Tony Clubb (born 12 June 1987) is an English professional rugby league coach who is the assistant coach at the Leigh Leopards in the Betfred Super League.
He is a former professional rugby league footballer who played as a prop for the Wigan Warriors in the Super League and has played for England at international level. He played for London under the guises of Harlequins RL and the London Broncos in the Super League.
